## isElementEqualOrContained() function

Returns true if the two elements are the same, or if `b` is a child of `a`<!-- -->.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export declare function isElementEqualOrContained(a: Element, b: Element): boolean;
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  a | Element | The element to check if it is equal to <code>b</code> or if it contains <code>b</code>. |
|  b | Element | The element to check if it is equal to <code>a</code> or contained inside it. |

<b>Returns:</b>

boolean

True if `a` is equal to `b` or if it contains `b`<!-- -->.
